executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped IntentTrace observability spec to close the gap left by specs 067 and 068, which both reference IntentTrace but neither owns the record shape, redaction policy, sampling/retention SST keys, replay tool, or operator dashboard. 10 BDD scenarios (SCN-071-A01..A10) cover one-trace-per-turn invariant, sampled-out envelopes, source-policy-driven redaction, deterministic replay, fail-loud SST, dashboard panels, refusal-counter join with spec 064, spec 067 bypass-guard read path, retention TTL enforcement, and golden schema pinning.

Created design.md for the IntentTrace observability surface, resolving Postgres-backed replay storage, structured log/OTel/export contracts, redaction before export, fail-loud SST keys, dashboard panels, and scenario-to-test mapping for SCN-071-A01..A10.

Created planning-only artifacts for SCN-071-A01..A10: four sequential scopes, scenario manifest, test plan JSON, user validation checklist, and report scaffold. Status remains in_progress with product-to-planning ceiling specs_hardened.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Ran unit + filtered integration tests against existing on-disk implementation surfaces for SCN-071-A01..A10. Unit packages internal/assistant/intenttrace (23 tests) and internal/config (TestIntentTraceConfigRequiresEverySSTKey + 8 sub-tests) all PASS. Live-stack integration filtered run via ./smackerel.sh test integration with --go-run '^(TestIntentTrace|TestIntentReplay|TestRefusalCause|TestRefusalCounter|TestAssistantIntents)' executed against smackerel-test compose (postgres+nats+ml+core+ollama+stub-providers+jaeger+searxng all healthy): 14 PASS, 0 FAIL in spec 071 packages (tests/integration/assistant, tests/integration/monitoring). Runner EXIT=1 due to pre-existing unrelated build failure in tests/integration/telegram/legacy_alias_test.go (undefined telegram.NewTestBotWithReplyRecorder and telegram.InterceptLegacyAliasForTest) outside this spec's change boundary. Marked first DoD item on Scopes 1, 2, and 4 as [x] with current-session evidence references; marked Canary DoD on Scope 2 as [x]; left Scope 3 first DoD unchecked because the planned integration row tests/integration/policy/intent_bypass_guard_test.go (SCN-071-A08) is not present on disk. Left all test-row and Build-Quality-Gate DoD items unchecked because (a) planned e2e files intent_trace_contract_e2e_test.go, intent_trace_privacy_e2e_test.go, and web/pwa/tests/assistant_intents_dashboard.spec.ts do not exist on disk, (b) the on-disk e2e files (intent_replay_test.go, intent_refusal_join_e2e_test.go, intent_bypass_guard_e2e_test.go) were not executed in this session, and (c) ./smackerel.sh format --check, ./smackerel.sh lint, and artifact-lint were not executed. report.md updated with Code Diff Evidence and Test Evidence sections including raw terminal output and Claim Source tags. certification.status remains in_progress; cannot certify until missing planned tests are added, on-disk e2e runs, and quality gates execute.
